Value.name: power_loops_disable_t_CTRL_VR_LOOP
Value.help: Power control and VR telemetry loops disabled

Value.name: power_loops_disable_t_CTRL_PVT_LOOP
Value.help: Power control and PVT telemetry loops disabled

Value.name: power_loops_disable_t_VR_PVT_LOOP
Value.help: Power VR and PVT telemetry loop disabled

Value.name: power_loops_disable_t_ALL
Value.help: Power control, VR and PVT telemetry loops disabled

Value.name: power_loops_minimum_plimit_t_NONE
Value.help: No required plimit requests per loop iteration

Member.name: resp_option
Member.help: Select 0: Synchronous, 1: Asynchronous response option (see ADCLK_CR1)

Member.name: recovery_step_wait
Member.help: Number of PLL output cycles to wait before recovery step (see ADCLK_CR1)

Member.name: recovery_step
Member.help: Size of code jump on recovery step (see ADCLK_CR1)

Member.name: resp_wait
Member.help: Number of PLL output cycles to wait before recovering back to nominal (see ADCLK_CR1)

Member.name: resp_code
Member.help: Code for synchronous droop response (see ADCLK_CR1)

Member.name: throttle_threshold
Member.help: Number of droop events seen within throttle window before throttle request is asserted (see ADCLK_CR2)

Member.name: throttle_window_count
Member.help: Window for counting droop events before triggering throttle request (see ADCLK_CR2)

Member.name: input_sense_enable
Member.help: Select between LDO input vs LDO output to monitor droops (0 = output, 1 = input)

Member.name: offset_value
Member.help: 0-63, Per-core value added/subtracted to/from the ldoDacIn[8:0] value driven by DVFS

Member.name: thresholds
Member.help: Tile VM thresholds (Vcore0-disable, Vcore1-disable, Vcpu0, Vsys)

Member.name: thresholds
Member.help: SOC VM thresholds (VSOC, VPCIE0P75, VDDQ1P1, VGPIO1P2, VSOC, VD2D0P55, VCLK_VPLL_0P875, VCLK_VPLL_0P875, VDDQ1P1, VSOC, VD2D0P55, VCLK_VPLL_0P875, VCLK_VPLL_0P875, VDDQ1P1, VSOC, VPCIE0P75, VDDQ1P1, VPLL1P2)

Member.name: vr
Member.help: 0 to disable, Voltage in mV to write to voltage regulator at boot

Member.name: poly_coefficients
Member.help: Polynomial for temperature scaling of leakage - indexed to process corner 0-SS, 1-TT, 2-FF, 3-unknown

Member.name: lckcntsel
Member.help: 0x0-0x3, Programmable count value for FLL frequency lock counter (dco1_lckcntsel)

Member.name: clk
Member.help: Sets the drive strength (0-7) for associated padring (clk)

Member.name: mdata
Member.help: Sets the drive strength (0-7) for associated padring (mdata)

Struct.name: power_knobs_t
Struct.help: Struct for power module configuration knobs

Member.name: loops_disable
Member.help: disabled loops (control, vr telem, pvt telem)

Member.name: soc_temp
Member.help: configuration for soc thermal alarms that feed into soc_hot and thermtrip

Member.name: current_throt
Member.help: configuration for odcm and dvfs current throttling

Member.name: current_threshold
Member.help: current threshold percentages for per-pstate generation

Member.name: tile_temp_throt
Member.help: configuration for tile temperature thresholds and related throttling

Member.name: adclk_offset
Member.help: configuration for adaptive clock offset (one per die; pick the right one during knob init)

Member.name: forced_vrs
Member.help: 0 or voltage_in mv for each VR

Member.name: leakage_temp_scaler
Member.help: polynomial coefficients for temperature scaling of leakage

Member.name: fllcal_pstate_bounds
Member.help: bounds to limit ftable frequency calibration

Member.name: minimum_plimit_updates
Member.help: minimum number of pstate updates per loop iteration - 0 -> 8 (0 is none, number of updates is 2^(x-1))

Member.name: static_rail_power_watts
Member.help: static/constant adder to account for other SoC power rails

Member.name: temp_telemetry_divider
Member.help: Number of control loop intervals per 1 VR temperature telemetry

Member.name: r_loadline_vcpu0_uohm
Member.help: Loadline resistance used in VR setpoint (and power adjustment) calculation (uOhm)

Member.name: r_loadline_vcpu1_uohm
Member.help: Loadline resistance used in VR setpoint (and power adjustment) calculation (uOhm)

Member.name: vsys_r_loadline_uohm
Member.help: Loadline resistance used in VR power adjustment calculation (uOhm)

Member.name: soc_maximum_thermal_watts_limit
Member.help: SOC maximum power limit, specific to thermal (W)

Member.name: soc_maximum_electrical_current_limit_vcpu0
Member.help: Vcpu0 current maximum value (A) which is used to determine the maximum electrical power limit

Member.name: vcpu_offset_mv
Member.help: offset in mV to apply to Vcpu calculation

Member.name: allowed_plimit_minimum
Member.help: limits control loop plimit selection - setting to nominal would disable turbo speeds

Member.name: max_plimit_step_size_up
Member.help: limits control loop plimit selection - max number of steps up

Member.name: max_plimit_step_size_down
Member.help: limits control loop plimit selection - max number of steps down

Member.name: intervals_to_lower_plimit
Member.help: Control loop intervals over which to sample last PSTATE (with no throttling) before lowering plimit below SCP calculated plimit

Member.name: activity_factor_dhry_adjustment
Member.help: A default activity factor to use with peak CPU current calculation

Member.name: power_enable_velocity_boost
Member.help: Enable velocity boost (prioritized turbo vs equal turbo)

Member.name: allow_plimit_below_nominal
Member.help: Outside of power capping, drop plimit to OS desired perf even if below nominal

Member.name: c4_cores_limit_to_nominal
Member.help: true to limit cores in c4 c-state to nominal perf

Member.name: c3_cores_limit_to_nominal
Member.help: true to limit cores in c3 c-state to nominal perf

Member.name: c2_cores_limit_to_nominal
Member.help: true to limit cores in c2 c-state to nominal perf

Member.name: enable_survivability_mode
Member.help: true to init DVFS in SW control mode and safe settings

Member.name: survivability_mode_pstate
Member.help: Pstate to boot to under survivability mode

Member.name: itd_cfg
Member.help: Controls whether ITD is enabled or disabled

Member.name: es1_fuse_overrides
Member.help: Enables Es1 power fuse overrides to match ES2 configurations

Member.name: rc0_override_for_rc3
Member.help: Enable RC0 VF recipe override for RC3 units (ES2/PC/PR samples)

Member.name: cppc_lowest_nonlin_perf
Member.help: Sets the lowest non-linear performance point for CPPC takes in pstate range 0-31 as input

Member.name: vmat_log_en
Member.help: Enable or disable DVFS VMAT debug log.

Member.name: fcal_log_en
Member.help: Enable or disable DVFS FCAL debug log.

Knob.name: power_control_loop_interval
Knob.help: Control loop interval in milliseconds

Knob.name: power_pvt_loop_interval
Knob.help: PVT telemetry loop interval in milliseconds

Knob.name: power_temp_telemetry_divider
Knob.help: Number of control loop intervals per 1 VR temperature telemetry

Knob.name: power_pid
Knob.help: Power PID configuration

Knob.name: power_soc_maximum_thermal_watts_limit
Knob.help: SOC maximum power limit specific to thermal (W). Defaults to fused value if set to 0

Knob.name: power_soc_maximum_electrical_current_limit_vcpu0
Knob.help: Vcpu0 current maximum value (A) used to determine the maximum electrical power limit.

Knob.name: power_soc_maximum_electrical_current_limit_vcpu1
Knob.help: Vcpu1 current maximum value (A) used to determine the maximum electrical power limit.

Knob.name: power_r_loadline_vcpu0
Knob.help: Loadline resistance (uOhm - used in Vcpu calculation)

Knob.name: power_r_loadline_vcpu1
Knob.help: Loadline resistance (uOhm - used in Vcpu calculation)

Knob.name: power_vsys_r_loadline
Knob.help: Loadline resistance (uOhm - used in Vsys power calculation)

Knob.name: power_activity_factor_dhry_adjustment
Knob.help: Activity factor with mpmm disabled

Knob.name: power_capping_mode
Knob.help: Power capping mode

Knob.name: power_enable_velocity_boost
Knob.help: Enable for velocity boost (priority-based turbo). Disabling leaves turbo enabled, without priority

Knob.name: power_c4_cores_limit_to_nominal
Knob.help: True to limit cores in C4 c-state to nominal performance

Knob.name: power_c3_cores_limit_to_nominal
Knob.help: True to limit cores in C3 c-state to nominal performance

Knob.name: power_c2_cores_limit_to_nominal
Knob.help: True to limit cores in C2 c-state to nominal performance

Knob.name: power_allow_plimit_below_nominal
Knob.help: Outside of power capping, drop plimit to OS desired performance even if below nominal (POR=false)

Knob.name: power_intervals_to_lower_plimit
Knob.help: Control loop intervals over which to sample last PSTATE (with no throttling) before lowering plimit below SCP calculated plimit

Knob.name: power_allowed_plimit_minimum
Knob.help: Limits control loop plimit selection

Knob.name: power_allowed_plimit_maximum
Knob.help: Limits control loop plimit selection

Knob.name: power_max_plimit_step_size_up
Knob.help: Limits control loop plimit selection. Max number of steps up

Knob.name: power_max_plimit_step_size_down
Knob.help: Limits control loop plimit selection. Max number of steps down

Knob.name: power_force_pstate
Knob.help: Limits plimit to forced pstate and rewrites pll/vma tables for lower performance states to prevent HW throttle

Knob.name: power_itd_cfg
Knob.help: Controls whether ITD is enabled or disabled

Knob.name: power_es1_fuse_overrides
Knob.help: Enables Es1 power fuse overrides to match ES2 configurations

Knob.name: power_rc0_override_for_rc3
Knob.help: Enable RC0 VF recipe override for RC3 fused units. When true and customer_sample_milestone is ES2/PC/PR (0x2-0x4), adjusts VF anchor LDO DAC codes to match RC0 recipe

Knob.name: vmat_log_en
Knob.help: Enable or disable DVFS VMAT debug log.

Knob.name: fcal_log_en
Knob.help: Enable or disable DVFS FCAL debug log.

Knob.name: power_current_throt
Knob.help: Configuration for core current throttling

Knob.name: power_tile_temp_throt
Knob.help: Configuration for tile temperature throttling

Knob.name: power_tile_vms
Knob.help: Configuration for tile voltage monitor thresholds

Knob.name: power_adclk_throt
Knob.help: configuration for adaptive clocking/throttling

Knob.name: power_soc_temp
Knob.help: Configuration for SOC temperature thresholds

Knob.name: power_soc_vms
Knob.help: Configuration for SOC voltage monitor thresholds

Knob.name: power_vcpu0_offset
Knob.help: Offset in mV to add to final Vcpu calculation

Knob.name: power_vcpu1_offset
Knob.help: Offset in mV to add to final Vcpu calculation

Knob.name: power_force_vrs
Knob.help: Can be used to override SOC voltage regulator settings during boot

Knob.name: power_enable_survivability_mode
Knob.help: True to initialize DVFS in SW control mode and safe settings

Knob.name: power_survivability_mode_pstate
Knob.help: Survivability mode pstate used to configure the core PLL in this mode

Knob.name: power_disable_loops
Knob.help: Can be used to disable power control and telemetry loops

Knob.name: power_minimum_plimit_updates
Knob.help: Guarantees all core plimits requested regularly by having minimum requirements per loop iteration

Knob.name: power_ldo_offset
Knob.help: Can be used to universally offset VF table LDODAC codes (offset in LDODAC code - not an mV offset)

Knob.name: power_leakage_temperature_polynomials
Knob.help: Coefficients to scale reference leakage to temperature

Knob.name: power_enable_fgpll_calsm
Knob.help: True to enable FGPLL calibration

Knob.name: power_fllcal_pstate_bounds
Knob.help: Start and end of fll calibration

Knob.name: power_plllock_cfg
Knob.help: Use to configure core PLL lock interrupt settings

Knob.name: power_nominal_pstate
Knob.help: Nominal pstate number, 0 uses SOC fused default

Knob.name: power_c1_telemetry_enable
Knob.help: Enable C1 telemetry in DVFS

Knob.name: power_soc_static_rails
Knob.help: Static power in mW to add to SOC power calculations

Knob.name: power_avs_ds
Knob.help: AVS drive strength

Knob.name: power_enable_vsys_vboot_override
Knob.help: If true and power_force_vrs knob for VSYS is zero update VSYS voltage from system Fuse field vsys_vid, else it relies of default setting of VSYS Vreg ie 921 mV

Knob.name: power_cppc_lowest_nonlin_perf
Knob.help: Sets the lowest non-linear performance point for CPPC takes in pstate range 0-31 as input

Knob.name: die0_core_spare_en_31_0
Knob.help: Can be used to enable previously disabled but not defective cores, set to 1 to enable

Knob.name: die0_core_spare_en_63_32
Knob.help: Can be used to enable previously disabled but not defective cores, set to 1 to enable

Knob.name: die0_core_spare_en_95_64
Knob.help: Can be used to enable previously disabled but not defective cores, set to 1 to enable

Knob.name: die1_core_spare_en_31_0
Knob.help: Can be used to enable previously disabled but not defective cores, set to 1 to enable

Knob.name: die1_core_spare_en_63_32
Knob.help: Can be used to enable previously disabled but not defective cores, set to 1 to enable

Knob.name: die1_core_spare_en_95_64
Knob.help: Can be used to enable previously disabled but not defective cores, set to 1 to enable
